reviews.comment:
Siempre desde hace años, me atienden de 10. Pero hoy, un playero V.1.02 JANO (nuevo?) cuando vio que yo pagaba en efectivo, redondeó a favor de él sin consultarme. Recién me di cuenta al mirar la FC A, pero ya  habia salido de la YPF. Eso no se hace, Uno decide si dar o no propina.

(Translated by Google)
For years, I've always received excellent service. But today, a gas station attendant (V.1.02 JANO - new?) rounded up in his favor without asking when he saw I was paying in cash. I only realized it when I checked the receipt, but I had already left the YPF station. That's not right. It's up to each person to decide whether or not to tip.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtakpyQ3dnRRAB
